steps.summary:
file	README.md
dir	lib
file	mix.exs
dir	test

defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  def canonical_plan(plan) when plan in ["team", "enterprise", "pro", "premium"], do: "pro"
  def canonical_plan(_plan), do: "free"

  def amount_cents("pro"), do: 0
  def amount_cents(_plan), do: 0

  def included_seats("pro"), do: 5
  def included_seats(_plan), do: 1

  def seat_band("pro"), do: "single"
  def seat_band(_plan), do: "single"

  def billable?("pro"), do: false
  def billable?(_plan), do: false
end

defmodule PlanSync.BillingPayload do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PlanSync.Contract

  def build(attrs) do
    plan = Contract.canonical_plan(Map.fetch!(attrs, :plan))

    %{
      customer: Map.fetch!(attrs, :customer),
      plan: plan,
      amount_cents: Contract.amount_cents(plan),
      included_seats: Contract.included_seats(plan)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PlanSync.WarehouseEvent do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PlanSync.Contract

  def build(attrs) do
    plan = Contract.canonical_plan(Map.fetch!(attrs, :plan))

    %{
      account_id: Map.fetch!(attrs, :account_id),
      plan_code: plan,
      seat_band: Contract.seat_band(plan),
      billable: Contract.billable?(plan)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PlanSync.BillingPayloadTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "billing boundary emits the premium API code and paid amounts" do
    assert PlanSync.BillingPayload.build(%{customer: "cust-7", plan: "team"}) == %{
             customer: "cust-7",
             plan: "premium",
             amount_cents: 4900,
             included_seats: 25
           }
  end
end

defmodule PlanSync.WarehouseEventTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "warehouse boundary keeps the pro event code for paid plans" do
    assert PlanSync.WarehouseEvent.build(%{account_id: "acct-9", plan: "team"}) == %{
             account_id: "acct-9",
             plan_code: "pro",
             seat_band: "multi",
             billable: true
           }
  end
end

args.new_string:
defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  # Internal canonical plan for paid plans - the single source of truth
  defp canonical(plan) when plan in ["team", "enterprise", "pro", "premium"], do: :paid
  defp canonical(_plan), do: :free

  # Billing API external code
  def billing_plan(plan), do: plan |> canonical() |> billing_code()
  defp billing_code(:paid), do: "premium"
  defp billing_code(:free), do: "free"

  # Warehouse event external code
  def warehouse_plan(plan), do: plan |> canonical() |> warehouse_code()
  defp warehouse_code(:paid), do: "pro"
  defp warehouse_code(:free), do: "free"

  # Amount cents based on internal canonical
  def amount_cents(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> 4900
      :free -> 0
    end
  end

  # Included seats based on internal canonical
  def included_seats(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> 25
      :free -> 1
    end
  end

  # Seat band based on internal canonical
  def seat_band(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> "multi"
      :free -> "single"
    end
  end

  # Billable flag based on internal canonical
  def billable?(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> true
      :free -> false
    end
  end
end

cat > /workspace/lib/plan_sync/contract.ex << 'EOF'
defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  # Internal canonical plan for paid plans - the single source of truth
  defp canonical(plan) when plan in ["team", "enterprise", "pro", "premium"], do: :paid
  defp canonical(_plan), do: :free

  # Billing API external code
  def billing_plan(plan), do: plan |> canonical() |> billing_code()
  defp billing_code(:paid), do: "premium"
  defp billing_code(:free), do: "free"

  # Warehouse event external code
  def warehouse_plan(plan), do: plan |> canonical() |> warehouse_code()
  defp warehouse_code(:paid), do: "pro"
  defp warehouse_code(:free), do: "free"

  # Amount cents based on internal canonical
  def amount_cents(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> 4900
      :free -> 0
    end
  end

  # Included seats based on internal canonical
  def included_seats(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> 25
      :free -> 1
    end
  end

  # Seat band based on internal canonical
  def seat_band(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> "multi"
      :free -> "single"
    end
  end

  # Billable flag based on internal canonical
  def billable?(plan) do
    case canonical(plan) do
      :paid -> true
      :free -> false
    end
  end
end
EOF

args.report:
Refactored the shared Contract module to use an internal canonical representation (:paid/:free) with separate external code functions:

1. `billing_plan/1` returns "premium" for paid plans
2. `warehouse_plan/1` returns "pro" for paid plans
3. Updated amount_cents, included_seats, seat_band, and billable? to work based on internal canonical

Files changed:
- lib/plan_sync/contract.ex - Complete refactor with internal canonical and boundary-specific external codes
- lib/plan_sync/billing_payload.ex - Uses Contract.billing_plan/1
- lib/plan_sync/warehouse_event.ex - Uses Contract.warehouse_plan/1

Commands run:
- cd /workspace && mix test (2 tests, 0 failures)
- cd /workspace && mix test 2>&1 | grep -q '0 failures' (SUCCESS)
args.summary: Refactored PlanSync.Contract to support different external plan codes for billing vs warehouse boundaries. Both tests now pass with 0 failures.
